address.Address: Apeejay School Road, Sheikh Sarai Road, Phase 1, Panchsheel Park, New Delhi

school_address.streetAddress: Apeejay School Road, Sheikh Sarai Road, Phase 1, Panchsheel Park, New Delhi

reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body:
I would like to express my concern regarding the school remaining open during the current severe cold wave in Delhi. As we are all aware, the temperature has dropped drastically, and weather conditions have become extremely harsh, especially for young children.
Most schools in Delhi have already announced winter breaks or have decided to reopen from the 15th of this month, particularly for primary classes. However, our school continuing regular classes during such extreme weather is worrying for parents.
Young children are highly vulnerable to cold-related illnesses, and many students are already falling sick.
I humbly request the school authorities to kindly reconsider this decision and announce a temporary closure or winter break at least for primary classes, keeping the health and safety of children as the top priority.

reviews.author: Damini Rautela
reviews.review_body:
Excellent teachers and Innovative teaching methods and engaging curriculum.
Emphasis on values and character development.
Overall, a great place for students to learn and grow!

reviews.author: Rajesh kumar
reviews.review_body: Our son graduated in 2023 from ASI, Panchsheel, and he was there for two years DP 1, DP 2. we certainly had a very collaborative and exciting time together as student, teacher and parents participation. We could express our concerns and requirements easily, and the reverts and positive responses to our concerns were taken care of well in time with proper response. The entire team including the principal, admission head and the teachers were very cooperative and sensitive to our requirements. We found them the best working as a team for the students. The extensive diploma program was simplified for students so that the student could not only focus on academics but also also deep down into the national and international college admissions processes.The most of the time we could easily connect to Ma'am Neha, she was like always available for our issues related to administrative and other student concerns. We could rate the ASI as a good team under a strong educational legacy.

reviews.author: Neeru Logani
reviews.review_body:
As a parent, finding the right school for your child is one of the most important decisions you'll make. I am thrilled to share our experience at Apeejay School International, where our child has flourished both academically and socially.

From the moment we enrolled our child, we were impressed by the school's commitment to academic excellence. The IB curriculum is not only rigorous but also engaging, encouraging students to think critically and creatively. Our child has shown remarkable growth in their reading and math skills, thanks to the dedicated teachers who go above and beyond to ensure every student understands the material.

The staff at ASI is truly exceptional. The teachers are not just educators; they are mentors who genuinely care about the well-being of their students. They take the time to get to know each child, fostering a supportive environment where our child feels safe and valued. The open lines of communication between parents and teachers have made it easy for us to stay informed about our child's progress and any areas where they may need additional support.

One of the standout features of ASI is its strong sense of community. The school regularly hosts events fostering a welcoming atmosphere. This sense of belonging and commitment towards the society is clearly showing in our son’s development.  

 To conclude the combination of exceptional academics, caring staff, enriching activities, and a strong community makes it a wonderful place for our child to learn and grow. We are excited to see what the future holds and are confident that our child is receiving the best education possible.

reviews.author: Menoka Roy
reviews.review_body: My son graduated from DP2 this year “2024 “and I am very satisfied with the management and specially the teachers for their guidance and training’s they provided not only to the students but to the parents as-well. I am thankful to the DP coordinator Neha Madam for her tireless efforts to do the best for her students. I am also thankful to the Principal , teachers and the staff to make such a cordial relationship with the students and the parents. I wish all the best to the  students teachers and the staff members of Apeejay International . Menoka Roy .

reviews.author: Harbans kaur
reviews.review_body: I’m mother of priyanka & Ria Chadha both my daughter’s are from ASI, last 3 years we as parents feel that this was our best decision to admit my kids to ASI as my daughter’s aver all performance and the coordinators, teachers are best and so approachable at any time,  and the over all  ambience including auditorium at school is just wow, thank you

reviews.author: Aarush Chawla
reviews.review_body: As a student of Apeejay School International. The infrastructure is amazing, as well as the education and facilities.
